name: ShellWard
description: AI Agent Security Middleware — injection detection, dangerous operation blocking, PII audit (incl. Chinese ID card, phone, bank card), data exfiltration prevention. SDK + OpenClaw plugin.

mode.description: enforce = block + log, audit = log only

injectionThreshold.description: Injection risk score threshold (0-100) to trigger block/alert

autoCheckOnStartup.description: Auto-check OpenClaw vulns, plugin risks, MCP config on startup

mode.label: Security Mode
mode.help: enforce blocks dangerous operations; audit only logs them

locale.label: Language
locale.help: auto detects from system LANG; zh for Chinese; en for English
